channel.title: Boss Kev Curated Newsfeed
channel.description: Curated Malaysia, global, tech, and health headlines ranked by freshness and interest.

item.title: Malaysia Is Running Out Of Caregivers And Time — Rashidi Yahaya
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
Malaysia requires a long-term care insurance framework that spreads risk across the population and creates a sustainable financing pool, built before the demographic wave hits full force, not after. The post Malaysia Is Running Out Of Caregivers And Time — Rashidi Yahaya appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: breaking(+3), urgent(+3), policy(+3), budget(+3), law(+3), parliament(+2), ministry(+2), war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Outpatient Overload: Can Private GPs Relieve Malaysia’s Public Hospitals? — Dr Mohamed Rafick Khan
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
Scaling GP responsibilities is feasible, but only with coordinated training pathways, regulatory recalibration, and performance-based contracting to maintain clinical governance standards nationwide. The post Outpatient Overload: Can Private GPs Relieve Malaysia’s Public Hospitals? — Dr Mohamed Rafick Khan appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: policy(+3), ministry(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2), diabetes(+2)

item.title: LIAM Alleges Average Medical Insurance Claim Only RM12,000
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
In defending the RM100k annual limit under the Base MHIT plan, LIAM claims that the average medical claim is only RM12,000, even though many ITOs in the insurance industry regularly tout policies with RM1m or higher annual limits for medical emergencies. The post LIAM Alleges Average Medical Insurance Claim Only RM12,000 appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: policy(+3), war(+3), ai(+3), dengue(+3)

item.title: Health PSSC Moots Expansion Of Insurance Coverage For Mental Health Services
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
The Health PSSC recommends expanding insurance coverage for mental health services, warning that limited coverage is pushing patients to pay out of pocket and straining public hospitals. Preventive care remains largely excluded from insurance. The post Health PSSC Moots Expansion Of Insurance Coverage For Mental Health Services appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: parliament(+2), ministry(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: MMA slams under-the-counter sale of diabetes meds for weight loss
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The association warns doctors against leasing their credentials to aesthetic operators that supply prescription diabetes drugs without proper medical checks.
Matched: law(+3), war(+3), ai(+3), breach(+3), diabetes(+2)

item.title: ‘I’m no Jho Low 2’: Rafizi’s ex-aide denies misappropriation claims, slams MACC’s public search
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 4 — James Chai, a former aide to Malaysia’s ex-economy minister Datuk Seri Rafizi Ramli,...
Matched: policy(+3), corruption(+3), war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3), artificial intelligence(+3), who(+2)

item.title: BAM to work with independent shuttlers, including Lee Zii Jia, for LA28 push
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail Sports (Sports)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 4 — The Badminton Association of Malaysia (BAM) is expected to continue working with professio...
Matched: election(+2), ai(+3), malaysia(+3), bam(+3), lee zii jia(+3), olympic(+2), badminton(+2)

item.title: MOH Wants RM29m Additional Funding For Psoriasis Biologics
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
MOH spent RM17.35 million on psoriasis biologics in 2025, up 46.7 per cent from 2024, and plans to seek RM29 million more from MOF for six biologic medicines. Biologics are needed for a small group of patients with difficult-to-control disease. The post MOH Wants RM29m Additional Funding For Psoriasis Biologics appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: ministry(+2), ai(+3), funding(+2), who(+2)

item.title: Medical Officer Duties, Service Load Strain FMS Gazettement Training — Government Doctor
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
A government doctor says FMS gazettement trainees juggle medical officer duties, clinics, and administrative work during a six-month training period. This appears specific to Family Medicine, as other specialties do not routinely undertake MO duties during gazettement. The post Medical Officer Duties, Service Load Strain FMS Gazettement Training — Government Doctor appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: policy(+3), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Hindu endowments boards must be set up at state level, says ministry
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Deputy national unity minister R Yuneswaran says religious affairs fall under state jurisdiction, citing the Federal Constitution.
Matched: policy(+3), law(+3), parliament(+2), ministry(+2), war(+3), ai(+3)
